doctrine: AD-derived targets first; Naabu validates reachability only. Low-noise survey discipline: authorized, scoped, no-target-mutation. Evidence is written locally only.

keyports_cybernet_json.description: Default Cybernet reachability validation profile. Durable JSON evidence for parser/package paths.

keyports_cybernet_pipe.description: Raw host:port stdout stream for local pipeline handoff into cybernet-detect enrichment. Not durable evidence.

web_reachability_only_json.description: Narrow web reachability (80,443) JSON evidence. CDN-safe key ports only.

web_reachability_only.description: Narrow web reachability (80,443) txt output for local pipeline handoff.

allports_low_noise_json.description: All TCP ports against approved AD-derived hosts only. Justification required.

udp_dns_snmp_json.description: UDP DNS/SNMP probe where the Cybernet survey requires UDP evidence. Justification required. Not default Phase 2b.

host_discovery_web_syn_txt.description: Approved subnet host discovery using web-like SYN path. Not a population source; AD remains population authority.

load_balanced_hostname_all_ips_json.description: Resolve and scan all IPs for load-balanced hostnames. Use example.invalid in docs and tests.
